record.field: Odoo Studio: Default form view for x_pets_line_8946a customization
Odoo Studio: Default form view for x_pets customization
Odoo Studio: Default search view for x_pets customization
Odoo Studio: Default form view for x_vaccines customization
Odoo Studio: Default list view for x_vaccines customization
Odoo Studio: Default list view for x_illnesses customization
Odoo Studio: Default search view for x_illnesses customization
Odoo Studio: Default list view for x_pets customization
Odoo Studio: Default kanban view for ir.model(813,) customization
Odoo Studio: Default form view for x_species customization

t.t-if: doc.partner_shipping_id == doc.partner_invoice_id and doc.partner_invoice_id != doc.partner_id or doc.partner_shipping_id != doc.partner_invoice_id

tr.t-att-class: 'fw-bold o_line_section' if ( line.display_type == 'line_section' or line.product_type == 'combo' ) else 'fst-italic o_line_note' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''

t.t-value: ', '.join([(tax.invoice_label or tax.name) for tax in line.tax_ids])

td.name: td_note_line
td.span: A note, whose content usually applies to the section or product above.

t.t-if: current_section and ( line_last or lines_to_report[line_index+1].display_type == 'line_section' or lines_to_report[line_index+1].product_type == 'combo' or ( line.combo_item_id and not lines_to_report[line_index+1].combo_item_id ) ) and not line.is_downpayment

p.span: The payment should also be transmitted with love
No further requirements for this payment

div.class: bg-light border-1 rounded h-100 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center p-4 w-100 opacity-75 text-muted text-center
bg-light border-1 rounded h-100 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center p-4 w-100 opacity-75 text-muted text-center

div.t-attf-class: article o_report_layout_standard o_table_standard o_company_#{company.id}_layout o_snail_mail {{'o_report_layout_background' if company.layout_background != 'Blank' else ''}}
div.t-attf-style: background-image: url({{ 'data:image/png;base64,%s' % company.layout_background_image.decode('utf-8') if company.layout_background_image and company.layout_background == 'Custom' else '/base/static/img/demo_logo_report.png' if company.layout_background == 'Demo logo' else ''}});

t.t-if: doc.partner_shipping_id == doc.partner_invoice_id and doc.partner_invoice_id != doc.partner_id or doc.partner_shipping_id != doc.partner_invoice_id

tr.t-att-class: 'fw-bold o_line_section' if ( line.display_type == 'line_section' or line.product_type == 'combo' ) else 'fst-italic o_line_note' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''

t.t-value: ', '.join([(tax.invoice_label or tax.name) for tax in line.tax_ids])

td.name: td_note_line
td.span: A note, whose content usually applies to the section or product above.

t.t-if: current_section and ( line_last or lines_to_report[line_index+1].display_type == 'line_section' or lines_to_report[line_index+1].product_type == 'combo' or ( line.combo_item_id and not lines_to_report[line_index+1].combo_item_id ) ) and not line.is_downpayment

p.span: The payment should also be transmitted with love
No further requirements for this payment

div.title: This block is not always present depending on the printed document.

div.class: bg-light border-1 rounded h-100 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center p-4 opacity-75 text-muted text-center
div.div: Usually contains a source address or a complementary address.

div.name: address
div.t-att-class: not custom_layout_address and colclass or information_block and colclass

div.class: bg-light border-1 rounded h-100 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center p-4 opacity-75 text-muted text-center
div.div: Usually contains the address of the document's recipient.

t.t-if: doc.partner_shipping_id == doc.partner_invoice_id and doc.partner_invoice_id != doc.partner_id or doc.partner_shipping_id != doc.partner_invoice_id

tr.t-att-class: 'fw-bold o_line_section' if ( line.display_type == 'line_section' or line.product_type == 'combo' ) else 'fst-italic o_line_note' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''

t.t-value: ', '.join([(tax.invoice_label or tax.name) for tax in line.tax_ids])

td.name: td_note_line
td.span: A note, whose content usually applies to the section or product above.

t.t-if: current_section and ( line_last or lines_to_report[line_index+1].display_type == 'line_section' or lines_to_report[line_index+1].product_type == 'combo' or ( line.combo_item_id and not lines_to_report[line_index+1].combo_item_id ) ) and not line.is_downpayment

p.span: The payment should also be transmitted with love
No further requirements for this payment

t.t-if: doc.partner_shipping_id == doc.partner_invoice_id and doc.partner_invoice_id != doc.partner_id or doc.partner_shipping_id != doc.partner_invoice_id

tr.t-att-class: 'fw-bold o_line_section' if ( line.display_type == 'line_section' or line.product_type == 'combo' ) else 'fst-italic o_line_note' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''

t.t-value: ', '.join([(tax.invoice_label or tax.name) for tax in line.tax_ids])

tr.t-att-class: 'fw-bold o_line_section' if ( line.display_type == 'line_section' or line.product_type == 'combo' ) else 'fst-italic o_line_note' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''

t.t-value: ', '.join([(tax.invoice_label or tax.name) for tax in line.tax_ids])

td.name: td_note_line
td.span: A note, whose content usually applies to the section or product above.

t.t-if: current_section and ( line_last or lines_to_report[line_index+1].display_type == 'line_section' or lines_to_report[line_index+1].product_type == 'combo' or ( line.combo_item_id and not lines_to_report[line_index+1].combo_item_id ) ) and not line.is_downpayment
